Class AdoptionServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.AdoptionServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdoptionService
public class AdoptionServiceImpl extends Object implements AdoptionService
Concrete implementation of AdoptionService that manages the full lifecycle of adoption requests. Each state transition is enforced by the domain object itself; this class is responsible for persisting the updated state and propagating side effects (animal and adopter record updates) to the appropriate repositories.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdoptionServiceImpl

      public AdoptionServiceImpl(AdoptionRequestRepository requestRepository, AnimalRepository animalRepository, AdopterRepository adopterRepository, AuditService<AdoptionRequest> auditService)
      Constructs a new AdoptionServiceImpl with the required repositories and audit service. All three repositories are needed for the full adoption lifecycle: the request must be persisted, and both the animal and adopter records updated on approval. The audit service records every state-changing operation for traceability.
      Parameters:
      requestRepository - the repository for adoption request persistence; must not be null
      animalRepository - the repository for animal record persistence; must not be null
      adopterRepository - the repository for adopter record persistence; must not be null
      auditService - the service used to log adoption operations; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • submit

      public void submit(AdoptionRequest request)
      Submits a new adoption request into the system for review. Throws an exception if the request is invalid or the animal is unavailable. Validates that the animal is still available before persisting the request.
      Specified by:
      submit in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to submit
      Throws:
      AnimalNotAvailableException - if the animal has already been adopted

    • approve

      public void approve(AdoptionRequest request)
      Approves a pending adoption request and marks the animal as adopted. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state. On approval, sets the animal's adopter ID and records the animal on the adopter, then persists all three updated records to their repositories.
      Specified by:
      approve in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to approve

    • reject

      public void reject(AdoptionRequest request)
      Rejects a pending adoption request with no further action on the animal. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      reject in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to reject

    • cancel

      public void cancel(AdoptionRequest request)
      Cancels a pending adoption request at the adopter's request. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      cancel in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to cancel

    • getRequestsByAdopter

      public List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByAdopter(Adopter adopter)
      Returns all adoption requests submitted by the given adopter. Returns an empty list if the adopter has no requests on record.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsByAdopter in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter whose requests to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests belonging to the adopter

    • getRequestsByShelter

      public List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
      Returns all adoption requests associated with animals in the given shelter. Returns an empty list if the shelter has no adoption requests.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsByShelter in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to query
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for animals in the shelter

    • getRequestsByAnimal

      public List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByAnimal(Animal animal)
      Returns all adoption requests for the given animal across all adopters. Returns an empty list if no requests exist for the animal.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsByAnimal in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests targeting the animal

    • getRequestsAfter

      public List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adoption requests submitted after the given date. Returns an empty list if no requests exist after that date.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsAfter in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests submitted after the date

    • getApprovedAfter

      public List<AdoptionRequest> getApprovedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all approved adoption requests where approval occurred after the given date. Returns an empty list if no approvals exist after that date. Uses submission date as a proxy for approval date, since the domain does not store a separate approval timestamp.
      Specified by:
      getApprovedAfter in interface AdoptionService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of approved adoption requests after the date

    • listAll

      public List<AdoptionRequest> listAll()
      Returns every adoption request currently persisted in the system. Returns an empty list if no requests have been submitted. Used by the presentation layer to render a full snapshot of the adoption queue. Delegates directly to the underlying repository's findAll query.
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface AdoptionService
      Returns:
      a list of all adoption requests
